content.thinking: The History Server is running. Now I need to wait for both SparkPi jobs to complete. Let me wait and poll.

content.text: History Server is Running. Waiting for both SparkPi jobs to complete.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  a_status=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-a -n spark-team-a -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Complete")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  b_status=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-b -n spark-team-b -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Complete")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] team-a Complete=$a_status  team-b Complete=$b_status"
  if [[ "$a_status" == "True" && "$b_status" == "True" ]]; then
    echo "Both jobs completed!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
